top.title: Germany troop cuts send wrong signal to Russia, say two top US Republicans
top.summary: The chairs of the House and Senate armed services committees said withdrawing 5,000 service personnel risked undermining deterrence.

top.title: Russian strikes kill 10 as Zelensky says Ukraine hits oil tankers and terminal
top.summary: Fatalities have been reported around Ukraine as Kyiv says Russian "shadow fleet" tankers were hit by drones.

top.title: Nigeria summons South African envoy over attacks on its nationals
top.summary: There has been a wave of anti-migrant protests in South Africa, some of which have turned violent.

top.title: Oscars says AI actors and writing cannot win awards
top.summary: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.

top.title: Bright idea? UK firm pioneers data centres using lampposts
top.summary: The solar-powered iLamps will have a built-in Nvidia chip but there are questions over their security and scalability.

top.title: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
top.summary: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.
